subcodes.first_line: The Book of God hath verily been made manifest in the Temple of Man. Say: Verily, He is the Most Great Temple among the nations, Who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الله قد کان علی هیکل الانسان مشهودا قل انه لهیکل الاعظم بین الامم الذی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within
